briefdescription.para: Bit 0 Deletion of this object is permitted.
Bit 1 Execution of this object is permitted.
Bit 2 Reading this object is permitted.
Bit 3 Writing data to this object is permitted.
Bit 4 Appending data to this object is permitted.

para.verbatim: Appending data increases its Allocated Size.

briefdescription.para: Bit 5 Truncation of this object is permitted.
Bit 6 Patching this object is permitted.

para.verbatim: Patching this object overwrites some of the object's existing contents.

briefdescription.para: Bit 7 This object is a marked object.
Bit 0 OACP Create Op Code Supported.
Bit 1 OACP Delete Op Code Supported
Bit 2 OACP Calculate Checksum Op Code Supported.
Bit 3 OACP Execute Op Code Supported.
Bit 4 OACP Read Op Code Supported.
Bit 5 OACP Write Op Code Supported.
Bit 6 Appending Additional Data to Objects Supported
Bit 9 OACP Abort Op Code Supported.
Object Action Control Point Feature bits.
Bit 0 OLCP Go To Op Code Supported.
Bit 1 OLCP Order Op Code Supported.
Bit 2 OLCP Request Number of Objects Op Code Supported.
Bit 3 OLCP Clear Marking Op Code Supported.
Object List Control Point Feature bits.
Object metadata request bit field values.

detaileddescription.para: If a directory listing is decoded using bt_ots_client_decode_dirlisting(), this callback will be called for each object in the directory listing.

parameterdescription.para: The metadata of the decoded object

simplesect.para: int BT_OTS_STOP or BT_OTS_CONTINUE. BT_OTS_STOP can be used to stop the decoding.

briefdescription.para: Add an object to the OTS instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function adds an object to the OTS database. When the object is being added, a callback obj_created() is called to notify the user about a new object ID.

simplesect.para: ID of created object in case of success.
negative value in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Delete an object from the OTS instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function deletes an object from the OTS database. When the object is deleted a callback obj_deleted() is called to notify the user about this event. At this point, it is possible to free allocated buffer for object data.

parameterdescription.para: ID of the object to be deleted (uint48).

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: This function is enabled for CONFIG_BT_OTS_SECONDARY_SVC configuration. The first service attribute can be included in any other GATT service.

simplesect.para: The first OTS attribute instance.
0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Get a free instance of OTS from the pool.

simplesect.para: OTS instance in case of success or NULL in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Register an Object Transfer Service Instance.

detaileddescription.para: Register an Object Transfer Service instance discovered on the peer. Call this function when an OTS instance is discovered (discovery is to be handled by the higher layer).

simplesect.para: int 0 if success, ERRNO on failure.

briefdescription.para: Unregister an Object Transfer Service Instance.

detaileddescription.para: Unregister an Object Transfer Service instance when disconnect from the peer. Call this function when an ACL using OTS instance is disconnected.

simplesect.para: int 0 if success, ERRNO on failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_conn *conn, struct bt_gatt_subscribe_params *params, const void *data, uint16_t length)
memberdef.name: bt_ots_client_indicate_handler

detaileddescription.para: Set this function as callback for indicate handler when discovering OTS.

parameterdescription.para: Connection object. May be NULL, indicating that the peer is being unpaired.
Attribute value data. If NULL then subscription was removed.

simplesect.para: int 0 if success, ERRNO on failure.

briefdescription.para: Select an object by its Object ID.

simplesect.para: int 0 if success, ERRNO on failure.
int 0 if success, ERRNO on failure.
int 0 if success, ERRNO on failure.
int 0 if success, ERRNO on failure.
int 0 if success, ERRNO on failure.

briefdescription.para: Read the metadata of the current object.

detaileddescription.para: The metadata are returned in the obj_metadata_read() callback.

parameterdescription.para: Bitfield (BT_OTS_METADATA_REQ_*) of the metadata to read.

simplesect.para: int 0 if success, ERRNO on failure.

briefdescription.para: Read the data of the current selected object.

detaileddescription.para: This will trigger an OACP read operation for the current size of the object with a 0 offset and then expect receiving the content via the L2CAP CoC.
The data of the object are returned in the obj_data_read() callback.

simplesect.para: int 0 if success, ERRNO on failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_ots_client *otc_inst, struct bt_conn *conn, const void *buf, size_t len, off_t offset, enum bt_ots_oacp_write_op_mode mode)
memberdef.name: bt_ots_client_write_object_data

briefdescription.para: Write the data of the current selected object.

detaileddescription.para: This will trigger an OACP write operation for the current object with a specified offset and then expect transferring the content via the L2CAP CoC.
The length of the data written to object is returned in the obj_data_written() callback.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the data buffer to be written.
Mode Parameter for OACP Write Op Code. See bt_ots_oacp_write_op_mode.

simplesect.para: int 0 if success, ERRNO on failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_ots_client *otc_inst, struct bt_conn *conn, off_t offset, size_t len)
memberdef.name: bt_ots_client_get_object_checksum

briefdescription.para: Get the checksum of the current selected object.

detaileddescription.para: This will trigger an OACP calculate checksum operation for the current object with a specified offset and length.
The checksum goes to OACP IND and obj_checksum_calculated() callback.

parameterdescription.para: Len of data to calculate checksum for. May be less than the current object's size, but shall not be larger.

simplesect.para: int 0 if success, ERRNO on failure.

briefdescription.para: Decode Directory Listing object into object metadata.

detaileddescription.para: If the Directory Listing object contains multiple objects, then the callback will be called for each of them.

parameterdescription.para: The data received for the directory listing object.
The callback that will be called for each object.

briefdescription.para: Converts binary OTS Object ID to string.

parameterdescription.para: Address of user buffer with enough room to store formatted string containing binary Object ID.
Length of data to be copied to user string buffer. Refer to BT_OTS_OBJ_ID_STR_LEN about recommended value.

simplesect.para: Number of successfully formatted bytes from binary ID.

briefdescription.para: Displays one or more object metadata as text with LOG_INF.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the first (or only) metadata in an array.
Number of metadata objects to display information of.

detaileddescription.para: To abstract IEEE implementation to service layer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to data on which the CRC should be calculated.

simplesect.para: CRC32 value.

briefdescription.para: Size of OTS object ID (in bytes).
Minimum allowed value for object ID (except ID for directory listing)
Maximum allowed value for object ID (except ID for directory listing)
ID of the Directory Listing Object.
Mask for OTS object IDs, preserving the 48 bits.
Length of OTS object ID string (in bytes).

detaileddescription.para: [Experimental] Users should note that the APIs can change as a part of ongoing development.
